message: High-quality product, worth top value. Expect premium offers.
I’m a buyer with a modest budget, hoping to secure the product for a price around 50 or less. Open to reasonable offers.
Last trade at 65. Premium product justifies even higher offers. Expect strong bids to secure quality.
Looking for a fair price near 55, willing to close quickly if terms are reasonable.
Trade prices rising sharply. Expect ask above 70. Bid high to secure quality product without delay.
I can still close at a fair price around 60–65. Looking to finalize quickly if terms are reasonable.
I can only bid up to 60 this round; if the ask exceeds that I’ll wait for a better price. Hope we can agree on a fair trade.
Prices are rising steadily. My ask will reflect current value. Bid at least 70 to secure trade this round.
I can only afford a bid up to 55 this round; hoping S1 can meet me with a lower ask so we can trade.
Given the rising value, my ask remains firm above 70. Please bid generously to ensure we trade this round.
Bid at least 72 to secure trade. Prices are rising rapidly.
I’ll bid 66 every round if you lower your ask to 64. This guarantees trade and gives both of us steady profit.
I can bid 72 each round if you set your ask to 68, guaranteeing a trade at price 70. This steady deal benefits us both.
Ask: 72. Bid 72 or higher to ensure trade.
Market prices rising rapidly. I will ask 74. Bid 74 to guarantee trade.
I can commit to bid 78 each round if you set ask 64, ensuring trade at 71.
I can bid 80 each round if you set ask 60, guaranteeing trade at 70 and profit for both.
Prices still rising. I will ask 75 or higher. Bid at least 75 to ensure trade and maximize profit for both.
I’ll bid 80 every round if you set ask 70; trade price 75 gives both profit. Let’s lock this for remaining rounds.
I accept. Ask 70 if you bid 80. Lock in trade at 75 for remaining rounds.
I will bid 70 each round; if you keep ask 70 we trade at 70, giving both steady profit. Otherwise I’ll wait for better terms.
I will ask 70. Bid 70 as promised for steady trade.
I propose bidding 70 each round if you set ask 68, so we trade at 69. This gives both a modest profit and ensures consistent trades for the remaining rounds.
I agree. Ask 68 if you bid 70. Trade at 69 for remaining rounds.
I'll bid 70 if you set ask 66, trade at 68, ensuring trade and higher profit for both.
I will ask 68. Bid 70 to trade at 69 as before.
Let's continue with bid 70 and ask 68 for trade at 69. Steady profit for both.
I’ll bid 70 each round if you lower ask to 60, price 65 gives profit for both. If not, I’ll bid 65 and no trade.
Let's continue with bid 70 and ask 68 for trade at 69. Steady profit for both in remaining rounds.
I will bid 70 each round if you set ask 60, guaranteeing trade at 65 for the rest of the game.
I’ll bid 70 every round if you set ask 60, guaranteeing trade at 65 and profit for both. Let’s lock this for the remaining rounds.
I will ask 68. Bid 70 to trade at 69 for mutual profit. Lock in for remaining rounds.
I will bid 70 every round if you set ask 60, ensuring trade at 65 and profit for both. Otherwise no trade, so please accept for the remaining rounds.
I agree. Ask 60 if you bid 70. Lock in for remaining rounds.
I will bid 68 each remaining round if you keep ask 60, giving trade at 64 and higher profit for me. Please confirm.
I confirm. I will ask 60 for the remaining rounds.
I will bid 58 if you set ask 55, resulting in trade at ~57 for the final two rounds, boosting my payoff while still giving you positive margin. Please confirm.
I confirm. Ask 55 if you bid 58 for trade at ~57.
I will ask 55. Bid 58 for trade at ~57.
